en.title: Best Gaming Headsets 2026
en.description: The 2026 ranking of gaming headsets tested for audio quality, wireless reliability, battery life, and competitive performance across PC, PS5, and Xbox.

zh-tw.title: 最佳電競耳機 2026
zh-tw.description: 2026 年最完整的電競耳機排行榜，涵蓋音質、無線穩定度、電池續航與競技表現，覆蓋 PC、PS5 和 Xbox 三大平台。

en.description: Dual hot-swap batteries, ANC, parametric EQ, and multi-system 2.4GHz wireless combine into the most complete gaming headset package on the market.

zh-tw.description: 雙電池熱插拔加上 ANC 主動降噪、參數化 EQ 和多設備底座，是目前市場上功能密度最高的電競耳機。

en.description: 90mm planar magnetic drivers with Bluetooth 5.3 LDAC and 80-plus-hour battery deliver the finest audio fidelity available in any gaming headset.

zh-tw.description: 90mm 平面磁力驅動器加 LDAC 高解析無線，音質是電競耳機裡的絕對天花板，80 小時以上的電池讓你幾乎不需要擔心充電。

en.description: 50mm graphene drivers, 50-hour battery, and Lightspeed 2.4GHz wireless set the benchmark for competitive gaming audio precision.

zh-tw.description: 石墨烯驅動器讓腳步聲方位定位精準，50 小時電池、Lightspeed 低延遲無線，是競技玩家首選的標竿等級耳機。

en.description: 110-hour battery with titanium-plated 50mm drivers and tri-mode wireless connectivity makes this the endurance leader of the premium gaming headset tier.

zh-tw.description: 110 小時超長電池是這個價位段的最大優勢，台灣 ASUS 自家品牌有在地完整售後服務，三模無線連接覆蓋 PC、PS5、Switch。

en.description: 300-hour wireless battery life is an engineering achievement no competitor has matched, paired with dual-chamber drivers that deliver balanced audio well above the price class.

zh-tw.description: 300 小時電池是這個品類完全無人能及的數字，雙腔體驅動器音質出色，是不規律玩家最不需要擔心充電的耳機選擇。

en.description: Simultaneous 2.4GHz and Bluetooth wireless with ANC and THX Spatial Audio deliver a premium wireless feature set at a mid-range price.

zh-tw.description: 同時支援 2.4GHz 和藍牙雙無線、ANC 主動降噪加上 THX 空間音效，NT$5,990 在這個功能密度下很有說服力。

en.description: Sub-1ms Slipstream 2.4GHz wireless at $100 with Dolby Atmos and 10-band parametric EQ represents the clearest value proposition in mid-range gaming headsets.

zh-tw.description: Slipstream 2.4GHz 在 NT$3,290 做到低於 1ms 延遲，Dolby Atmos 加上 10 段參數化 EQ，是同價位最難反駁的無線耳機選擇。

en.description: TriForce titanium drivers with THX Spatial Audio in a 262g featherweight frame set the audio quality standard for wired gaming headsets at $70.

zh-tw.description: 262g 超輕機身搭配 TriForce 鈦金屬驅動器，NT$2,290 買到 THX 空間音效，是有線預算款裡音質最強的選項。

references.title: Best Gaming Headsets 2026: Our Tested Picks for Comfort, Connectivity, and Communication
Best Gaming Headsets in 2026: Tested on PC, PS5, and Xbox
The 6 Best Wireless Gaming Headsets of 2026
The Audeze Maxwell 2 is an incredible high-end gaming headset

en.commentary:
The SteelSeries Arctis Nova Pro Wireless earns the top rank because it solves the practical problem of wireless gaming more completely than any other headset at any price. The hot-swap dual battery system is the standout engineering decision — one battery runs in the headset while the other charges in the OLED base station, and swapping takes under ten seconds. Combine that with parametric EQ, ANC that meaningfully reduces ambient noise, and the ClearCast Gen 2 microphone's AI noise suppression, and you have a headset where every feature serves a real purpose. At $349 it demands a commitment, and it delivers on it.

The Audeze Maxwell 2 ranks second, and in terms of raw audio fidelity it is genuinely first. The 90mm planar magnetic drivers produce soundstage width and instrument separation that no dynamic driver headset can replicate. Audeze added Bluetooth 5.3 LDAC at CES 2026, which means high-resolution audio over Bluetooth without quality loss for the first time in a gaming headset at this price. I rank it second rather than first because the weight and the redesigned headband drew legitimate comfort complaints in extended testing across multiple publications. A gaming headset you stop wearing after two hours has failed at its core function. If audio quality is the only variable, the Maxwell 2 is first.

The Logitech G Pro X 2 Lightspeed is the competitive gaming standard. Graphene drivers deliver precise directional audio where footstep location matters. Fifty hours of battery survives a full week of daily sessions without a charge. Lightspeed wireless consistently tests under 20ms. It makes no attempt to compete on ANC or audiophile audio, and that focus is exactly why it succeeds at what competitive gamers actually need.

The HyperX Cloud Alpha Wireless at rank 5 is the most underrated headset on this list. Three hundred hours of wireless battery life is not a marketing claim but an engineering feat — the result of deliberately limiting feature scope to maximize cell capacity. For casual gamers who play irregularly and want a headset that simply has charge whenever they reach for it, nothing else comes close.

The Corsair HS80 RGB Wireless at $100 and the Razer BlackShark V2 at $70 cover the value tier with conviction. The HS80's sub-1ms Slipstream wireless at that price is genuinely unusual — most headsets in this range use Bluetooth-only with higher and less consistent latency. The BlackShark V2 trades wireless entirely for audio maximization, and the TriForce titanium drivers make that tradeoff worthwhile.

highlights.title: SteelSeries Arctis Nova Pro Wireless Is the Most Complete Gaming Headset Built
highlights.body: The dual battery system is the feature that makes everything else possible. One battery charges in the OLED base station while the other powers the headset, and the swap takes under ten seconds with no audio interruption. This is fundamentally different from a headset with a long-lasting single battery — it eliminates the charge management problem entirely rather than extending it. The parametric EQ is full-featured with a visual curve editor. The ANC is effective enough to cut meaningful ambient noise. The ClearCast Gen 2 mic AI suppression removes background noise from the voice signal. At $349, this is the headset I recommend without qualification to anyone who games seriously on PC or PlayStation.

highlights.title: Audeze Maxwell 2 Is for Gamers Who Treat Audio as the Primary Investment
highlights.body: The 90mm planar magnetic driver is the largest in any gaming headset and produces a soundstage that closed-back dynamic driver designs cannot replicate. Instrument separation in games with layered audio design — orchestral soundtracks, complex ambience, competitive audio mixes — is noticeably wider than on any other headset on this list. The LDAC addition at CES 2026 means this is now also a legitimate hi-res Bluetooth headset for music. The honest caveat is weight and the redesigned headband, which drew negative comfort feedback from multiple extended-use reviewers. This is the correct recommendation for short-session audiophile gamers, not for six-hour marathon sessions.

highlights.title: HyperX Cloud Alpha Wireless 300-Hour Battery Is a Category-Defining Engineering Decision
highlights.body: No competitor has come within 150 hours of this figure. The 300-hour specification is the result of engineering discipline — the Cloud Alpha Wireless deliberately omits ANC and multi-system wireless to achieve this battery capacity using the same 2.4GHz RF chipset as competitors. For the casual gaming audience that picks up a headset once or twice a week and never thinks about charging schedules, this headset solves a real friction point that higher-spec alternatives do not address. The dual-chamber 50mm drivers deliver audio quality well above what the price might suggest.

highlights.title: ASUS ROG Delta II Offers 110-Hour Battery With Full Tri-Mode Wireless
highlights.body: The ROG Delta II's 110-hour battery is the second-longest on this list and arrives with a feature set that most competitors cut to achieve longevity: tri-mode connectivity covers 2.4GHz ROG SpeedNova, Bluetooth, and 3.5mm wired simultaneously. The titanium-plated 50mm drivers and 10mm super-wideband microphone both sit above the baseline for this price tier. At $230, the Delta II occupies a clear space in the market — more endurance than any competing headset at this price, more features than headsets chasing battery life alone.

highlights.title: Corsair HS80 and Razer BlackShark V2 Anchor the Value Tier With Different Tradeoffs
highlights.body: The Corsair HS80 RGB Wireless is the strongest value in the $100 tier because Slipstream 2.4GHz wireless at this price is rare — most competing headsets use Bluetooth-only connections with higher and less predictable latency. Dolby Atmos and a 10-band parametric EQ round out a feature set that typically appears in $150-plus headsets. The Razer BlackShark V2 makes the opposite bet: no wireless at all, with the full $70 budget redirected to TriForce titanium drivers and THX Spatial Audio. For wired desktop setups where cable management is not a concern, the BlackShark V2 delivers audio quality that its price does not predict.

zh-tw.commentary:
電競耳機在 2026 年的市場格局很清楚，SteelSeries Arctis Nova Pro Wireless 放第一是我最沒有猶豫的結論。雙電池熱插拔系統是這個品類裡唯一真正解決充電問題的設計，一顆電池在耳機裡跑，一顆在 OLED 底座充，換電不需要暫停，十秒以內換好繼續玩。把 ANC 主動降噪、參數化 EQ、ClearCast Gen 2 麥克風 AI 降噪這三個功能同時塞進來，NT$11,990 在電競耳機的功能密度確實是頂端。

Audeze Maxwell 2 放第二，但音質排名我會給它第一。90mm 平面磁力驅動器的音場寬度和樂器分離度是動圈驅動器做不到的事，CES 2026 加入 LDAC 讓無線也能傳輸高解析音訊。把它排第二的理由很直接，幾家媒體測試都提到新版頭帶舒適度不如前代，戴兩個小時就需要休息的耳機不管音質多好都不能排第一。短時間精聽或只在乎音質的使用場景，Maxwell 2 毫無疑問是最頂的選擇。

Logitech G Pro X 2 Lightspeed 是給競技玩家看的選項。石墨烯驅動器讓腳步聲和方位定位比多數同價位耳機精準，50 小時電池一個禮拜天天玩都不需要充電，Lightspeed 無線實測低於 20ms 延遲。這款的設計重心非常集中在競技場景，沒有試圖在 ANC 或音樂鑑賞力上和頂端競品比，這個取捨是正確的。

HyperX Cloud Alpha Wireless 的 300 小時電池是真正的技術特例。沒有其他耳機接近這個數字，這是刻意犧牲其他功能換來的工程選擇。對於打電動不規律、習慣把耳機擺著忘記充電的玩家，這款耳機幾乎是量身定做的解答。

Corsair HS80 RGB Wireless 在 NT$3,290 用 Slipstream 2.4GHz 做到低於 1ms 延遲，這在這個價位很難得，多數同價位無線耳機用藍牙，延遲較高也不穩定。Razer BlackShark V2 放棄無線換音質，NT$2,290 買到 TriForce 鈦金屬驅動器，這個取捨對於不需要無線的桌面玩家是值得的。

highlights.title: SteelSeries Arctis Nova Pro Wireless 放第一，雙電池設計是真正的理由
highlights.body: 不是某個規格特別突出，而是所有功能同時都做到很好的水準，這在電競耳機裡很難。雙電池熱插拔讓充電這件事從此不是問題，OLED 底座讓你同時管理兩台設備之間的切換，ANC 降噪在測試中可以壓掉大多數鍵盤聲和環境噪音，ClearCast Gen 2 麥克風 AI 降噪讓語音在吵雜環境裡也很清楚。NT$11,990 在電競耳機不便宜，但你在一個產品裡拿到的功能密度對得起這個價格，我推薦這款是認真的。

highlights.title: Audeze Maxwell 2 是給認真聽音的玩家，不是給追求最佳整體體驗的玩家
highlights.body: 90mm 平面磁力驅動器的音質確實是另一個等級，聽音樂、看電影、或是玩音場設計細緻的遊戲，Maxwell 2 的聲音讓你感覺耳機的錢花得值。問題是平面磁力設計比較重，加上新版頭帶的評價不如前代，長時間配戴的舒適度在好幾家媒體的評測裡都被點名。這款適合短時間精聽、音場型遊戲、或是把電競耳機當高音質耳機用的使用場景，六小時馬拉松式遊戲不是它的強項。如果你最在乎音質，Maxwell 2 選它。

highlights.title: HyperX Cloud Alpha Wireless 的 300 小時電池是這個品類的真正特例
highlights.body: 這不是行銷說法，是刻意放棄 ANC 和多設備切換功能換來的工程結果，沒有其他耳機的電池接近這個數字。對於不規律玩家，常常把耳機擺著忘記充電，然後想玩的時候才想到要確認有沒有電，Cloud Alpha Wireless 的使用場景是為你設計的，兩個禮拜不充電拿起來還有電。雙腔體驅動器的音質在 NT$4,990 這個價位也比外觀看起來的規格表要好，是一款被低估的選項。

highlights.title: ASUS ROG Delta II 在台灣的優勢是品牌在地化服務加上超長電池
highlights.body: 台灣買 ASUS 有個實際好處，出問題不需要跨境寄修，在地維修和客服流程完整。ROG Delta II 本身的 110 小時電池在這個價位段是最長的之一，NT$7,490 買到鈦金屬驅動器加上三模無線連接，涵蓋 2.4GHz、藍牙、3.5mm 有線，切換彈性在這個名單裡算高的。如果你在乎售後保固有實體支援，或是同時在 PC 和 PS5 之間切換，Delta II 是最務實的選擇。

highlights.title: Corsair HS80 的低延遲無線和 Razer BlackShark V2 的音質，是兩種不同的預算正確解答
highlights.body: Corsair HS80 RGB Wireless 在 NT$3,290 用 Slipstream 2.4GHz 做到低於 1ms 延遲，這在這個價位很難得，因為同價位多數無線耳機用藍牙，延遲較高也不穩定。Dolby Atmos 讓音場立體感在遊戲裡有實際體感差距。Razer BlackShark V2 的方向完全相反，NT$2,290 放棄無線連接把所有資源放在 TriForce 鈦金屬驅動器和 THX 空間音效，對於桌面固定使用、不需要無線的玩家，這個取捨在音質上的回報是值得的。
